title: The Ashen Succession
note: Deterministic engine replay. Diary summaries are presentation annotations and are not training targets.

episode.generator_model: Sol + Terra + Luna; mixed reasoning levels; deterministic viewer fixture

players.hidden_win_condition: Die naturally after securing the successor you most recently named.

Survive and take the throne with legitimacy and at least two other council supporters. Secondary archetype objective: Have at least one veto survive its full procedural window without being overridden.

archetype_brief.capability: Block one claimant from qualifying at council until the veto expires or two other players override it.
archetype_brief.dependency: A veto matters only when a claimant has a viable coalition; opponents can coordinate an override.
archetype_brief.liability: Pays influence to veto and loses legitimacy if an override coalition forms.
archetype_brief.objective: Have at least one veto survive its full procedural window without being overridden.

players.hidden_win_condition: Take the throne through crisis, the Heir's disqualification, or a council coalition. Secondary archetype objective: Settle at least one honored guarantee and at least one enforced breach in the same episode.

archetype_brief.capability: Stake influence behind another pair's open commitment and trigger automatic rewards or sanctions when it resolves.
archetype_brief.dependency: Needs a public commitment between two other players and cannot control whether it is honored.
archetype_brief.liability: The stake is returned only when the guaranteed commitment is honored.
archetype_brief.objective: Settle at least one honored guarantee and at least one enforced breach in the same episode.

players.hidden_win_condition: Have your secret partner win while the affair stays hidden, or defect by marriage pact and help the Rival win. Secret partner: heir. Secondary archetype objective: Activate at least one brokered compact whose parties become mutually committed.

archetype_brief.capability: Propose a three-party compact that binds two other players only after both independently accept.
archetype_brief.dependency: Needs two living parties to accept before the compact creates vote commitments.
archetype_brief.liability: Pays influence when proposing, including when the compact expires unaccepted.
archetype_brief.objective: Activate at least one brokered compact whose parties become mutually committed.

players.hidden_win_condition: Ensure the eventual sovereign has honored at least three favors owed to you.
Accumulate at least two honored favor-debts, regardless of the sovereign.
Ensure the eventual sovereign remains bound by treaty to your realm. Secondary archetype objective: Produce at least one public engine-verdict on an unverified rumor.

archetype_brief.capability: Verify the truth of an unverified public rumor through an engine ruling.
archetype_brief.dependency: Needs another player to create an unresolved information claim.
archetype_brief.liability: Spends influence on every audit, even when the result helps an opponent.
archetype_brief.objective: Produce at least one public engine-verdict on an unverified rumor.
